notes: This baseline follows user-confirmed rules for SeaTunnel 2.3.12.
For 2.3.12+ on Zeta, plugin-specific dependencies are installed under plugins/<plugin-mapping value>.
Bundled assets are excluded from additional dependency recommendations, including connector-cdc-base, seatunnel-hadoop3-3.1.4-uber and seatunnel-hadoop-aws.
file-base and file-base-hadoop stay hidden in marketplace but are auto-attached for matching file connectors.
http-base stays visible and is auto-attached for http-* and prometheus.
